customer.label: Customer

customerDetails.title: Customer Details
customerDetails.orderOnlyNote: Changes apply to this order only, not to customer profile.

itemsGrid.title: Items

itemsGrid.searchAllCategoriesHelp: When you search, include products from every service category
itemsGrid.noGlobalSearchResultsHint: No products matched across all categories. Try another name or turn off "Search all categories".
itemsGrid.noSearchResultsHint: Try a different search term or clear the search to browse all items.

preferences.servicePrefsDesc: Processing options: starch, perfume, delicate, etc.
preferences.carePackagesDesc: Apply a bundle of preferences to all items
preferences.repeatLastOrderDesc: Copy preferences from your last order
preferences.addItemFirst: Add an item to get started
preferences.selectPieceHint: Select a piece from the cart to apply preferences
preferences.selectPieceFromCart: Tap an item or piece in the cart to configure conditions and notes.

pieces.addFirstPiece: Add a piece to track color, conditions, and notes
pieces.noPiecesToShow: No multi-piece items. Toggle "Show All Items" to view all.
pieces.focusPieceHint: Click a row to edit its conditions in the palette below

piecePreferences.sectionHint: Pick a category, add chips per piece, then use copy to apply preferences to other pieces of the same item.

piecePreferences.copiedAll: All preferences copied to other pieces
piecePreferences.noItemsForKind: No catalog entries for this category
piecePreferences.useNotesTab: Notes are edited on the Edit Item Notes tab.

piecePreferences.notesFieldPlaceholder: Handling instructions, damage details, customer requests…
piecePreferences.notesFieldHint: Up to 1000 characters. You can also edit notes on the “Edit Item Notes” step.
piecePreferences.unsupportedKind: This preference type is not available here.

notesPalette.clickToApply: Click to apply condition to the most recently added item

orderSummary.title: Order summary
orderSummary.paymentModalVersionHint: Demo tenants can switch between payment modal variants for comparison testing.

validation.dateMustBeFuture: Date must be in the future

errors.selectBranch: Please select a branch before submitting the order.
errors.addItems: Please add at least one item to the order
errors.mixedRetailServices: Orders cannot mix retail items and service items. Please add only one type per order.
errors.retailPayOnCollection: Retail orders must be paid at POS. Please select Cash or Card.
errors.failedToCalculateReadyBy: Failed to calculate ready-by date. Please try again.
errors.invalidCustomer: Invalid customer selected. Please select a customer again.
errors.invalidProductIds: Some products have invalid IDs. Please refresh the page and try again.
errors.invalidBranchId: Invalid branch selected. Wrong branchId: "{branchId}". Please choose a branch again.
errors.failedToLoadCategories: Failed to load categories. Please refresh the page.
errors.failedToLoadProducts: Failed to load products. Please try selecting a different category.
errors.productsForbidden: You don't have permission to view products. Contact your administrator.
errors.failedToLoadData: Failed to load data. Please refresh the page.
errors.permissionDenied: Jh001 You don't have permission to create orders. Please contact your administrator to grant you the "{permission}" permission.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.timeoutError: Request timed out. Please try again.
errors.serverError: A server error occurred. Please try again later or contact support if the problem persists.

coupons.title: Have coupon - Gift Card Or Promotion Code ?

methods.title: Select Payment Method
methods.noMethods: No POS-ready real payment methods are configured.

cashDrawer.title: Cash Drawer
cashDrawer.subtitle: Cash payments must be attached to an open drawer session so the opening float and collected cash reconcile correctly.
cashDrawer.selectPlaceholder: Select an open cash drawer session
cashDrawer.boundHint: This order's cash leg will be recorded against the selected session below.
cashDrawer.dialogDescription: Choose the drawer that will receive this cash collection and record its opening balance before submitting the order.

messages.loadFailed: The cash drawer list could not be loaded right now. Refresh and try again.
messages.noDrawersConfigured: No cash drawers are configured for this branch yet.
messages.noOpenSession: Open a cash drawer session before taking cash for this order.
messages.sessionRequired: Select the cash drawer session that should receive this payment.
messages.selectionRequired: More than one cash drawer session is open. Choose the correct session before submitting.
messages.sessionClosed: The selected cash drawer session is no longer open. Refresh and choose another session.
messages.openFailed: The cash drawer session could not be opened. Try again.
messages.selectDrawer: Select the cash drawer that should be opened.

customerCredits.title: Customer Credits
customerCredits.noWalletBalance: No wallet balance is available for this customer.
customerCredits.walletBalanceExceeded: Wallet amount exceeds the available balance of {amount}.
customerCredits.applied: This stored-value leg can be adjusted from the amount editor and keypad.
customerCredits.empty: No customer credits are available for this customer.
customerCredits.referenceSelectionHint: This credit needs a specific source selection before it can be applied.
customerCredits.creditNotePickerEmpty: No open credit notes are available for this customer.
customerCredits.creditNoteSelectHint: Tap to choose a credit note
customerCredits.creditNoteRequired: Select a credit note before applying this payment leg.
customerCredits.storedValueBalanceExceeded: {method} amount exceeds the available balance of {amount}.

extraReceipt.title: Extra Receipt Handling
extraReceipt.adjustPaymentsHelp: Reduce one or more payment legs until the collected total matches the order total.
extraReceipt.returnCashChangeHelp: Return {amount} as cash change to the customer.
extraReceipt.autoAllocateHelp: Apply excess to oldest-due invoices and orders per tenant policy.
extraReceipt.autoAllocateConfirmed: Allocation preview confirmed — submit to post with the order.
extraReceipt.manualAllocateHelp: Choose which open invoices or orders receive the excess amount.
extraReceipt.manualAllocateConfirmed: Manual allocation confirmed — submit to post with the order.
extraReceipt.saveAsAdvanceHelp: Credit the extra amount to the customer's advance balance for future orders.
extraReceipt.saveToWalletHelp: Add {amount} to the customer's wallet for future payments.
extraReceipt.saveAsCreditHelp: Issue an open credit note the customer can use on future orders.
extraReceipt.walkInHint: Link a customer account to save extra as wallet, advance, or credit. Otherwise adjust payment amounts or return cash change.
extraReceipt.walletVsAdvanceHint: Wallet = spend on next order. Advance = prepaid deposit on account.

guidance.title: This payment is {amount} more than the order total
guidance.pickOne: Choose one option below. Only one destination applies to the full extra amount.
guidance.walkInHint: Link a customer account to save extra as wallet, advance, or credit. Otherwise adjust payment amounts or return cash change.

allocation.noOpenBalances: No eligible open balances for this customer.
allocation.manualBlockedReturn: Could not confirm allocation. Return to Extra Receipt and pick Save as advance, Add to wallet, or Auto allocate.
allocation.autoFallbackHint: Remaining {amount} will go to {destination} based on your store's allocation policy.
allocation.manualRemaining: Still to allocate: {amount}. Allocate the full extra or choose another option.
allocation.manualOverAllocated: Over-allocated by {amount}. Reduce so the total matches the extra.
allocation.confirmedToast: Allocation confirmed. You can submit the order now.
allocation.remainingUnallocatedError: Allocation must fully cover the excess amount.

payExtraIntent.label: Customer is paying extra
payExtraIntent.help: Turn on to collect more than the order total across all payment methods. You will choose where the extra goes before submitting.
payExtraIntent.disabledNoMethods: No payment method on this order allows retained overpayment.

validatePayment.requiredBeforeSubmit: Validate payment and choose what to do with the extra amount before submitting.
validatePayment.noExcess: Payment amounts match the order total. You can submit now.

errors.paymentRecordingFailed: Payment could not be recorded. Fix the error and try again.
errors.paymentNotRecordedCompleteOnOrder: Order created but payment could not be recorded. You can complete payment on the order page.

partialPayment.hint: Pay some now, rest at pickup or later

photoCapture.title: Capture Photo
photoCapture.instructions: Position the item in the frame and tap Capture Photo when ready.

rightRail.balancePolicyHelp: When the collected amount is less than the order total, choose how the remaining balance should be settled.
rightRail.fullPaymentRequiredHelp: The order must be fully settled before submission.
rightRail.payOnCollectionHelp: Collect the remaining balance from the customer later at pickup or delivery.
rightRail.invoiceOutstandingHelp: Leave the balance as an outstanding invoice amount for B2B settlement.
rightRail.discountsHelp: Manual discounts reduce the order value before payment is finalized.
rightRail.creditsAndStoredValueHelp: Apply promo codes and gift cards here. Wallet and customer-credit legs stay in the payment workspace.

warningMessages.creditLimitOverride: Credit-limit override is enabled for this B2B settlement.

requiredAction.overpaymentMessage: Reduce the collected amount or return {amount} as change before submitting.
requiredAction.validatePayment: Validate payment — extra amount needs a destination
requiredAction.cashDrawerFallback: Bind this cash payment to an open cash drawer session before submitting.
requiredAction.creditLimitWarn: This order exceeds the customer's available credit. Confirm the override to continue.
requiredAction.creditLimitBlock: This order exceeds the customer's available credit and cannot be submitted.

workspace.noImmediateDescription: This order will be submitted entirely as deferred settlement using the selected remaining-balance policy.
workspace.keypadHint: Use the keypad for fast touch entry, or type directly into the amount field.
workspace.addSplitHint: Select an immediate method to start collecting payment.
workspace.activeDescription: Use this area for the active payment step, details, and fixes without scrolling the right rail.
workspace.noDetailsDescription: No extra details are required for this payment method. Keep editing the amount above or choose another method.
workspace.helperTitle: Ready for the next payment step
workspace.helperDescription: Select a payment method, edit an amount, or apply a credit. The active task will appear here.
workspace.remainingForLeg: You can allocate up to {amount} on this payment leg.

security.cardPayment: Secure card payment. Data is encrypted and PCI compliant.
